meta.method: priority buckets: _abs -> gold∩top5=∅ -> gold⊄top5 -> D-repeat-correct -> partial-verdict -> residual

residual_subcategories.method: per-row classification of the 35 residual-reasoning misses (question + gold vs generated + judge_reasoning); dominant cause per row
notes: Dominant residual mode is over-abstention with sufficient evidence visible: ~18/35 rows abstained.
Preference-application (9): 6 had a rendered preference constraint block (intent=preference) and the reader still abstained/failed — apply-instruction insufficient; 3 never fired — detection gap.
aggregation-count (8) + date-arithmetic (3) failed WITH compute notes enabled (Cell 4 ran includeComputeNotes) — notes did not rescue these.
stale-value (3): knowledge-update answered with the superseded value.
wrong-instance (3): coreference/instance confusion between similar events.

top5-context-cap.note: evidence-absent (4) + evidence-partial (27); R@10=99.6% puts the missing gold sessions almost entirely at ranks 6-10 — context assembly, not retrieval quality

over-abstention-with-evidence.note: gen-prompt abstention calibration / preference apply-instruction strength

measurement-bands.note: symmetric rerun noise + strict-judge band; not system defects, bound the measurable ceiling
